name: Stars Microelectronics (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Stars Microelectronics (Thailand) Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides electronics manufacturing services in Thailand and the United States. It operates through two segments, Microelectronics Module Assembly and Integrated Circuit (IC) Packaging. The company is involved in the manufacture and distribution of integrated circuit boards and radio frequency identification tags; and equipment used to generate electricity from solar energy or alternative energy. It also engages in the generation and distribution of electricity from solar energy or alternative energy; and trading business. The company provides services to original equipment manufacturers, original design manufacturer, and outsourced assembly and test that offers IC packaging services. Its services cover IC packaging and testing; print circuit board assembly (PCBA) and box build, which cover Internet of Things, medical, energy management, and automotive devices, as well as industrial control modules; and fiber optics devices comprising data center, broadcasting, and LiDAR applications. The company serves electronic equipment, automobiles, medical equipment, communications, and entertainment industries. Stars Microelectronics (Thailand) Public Company Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya, Thailand.
